segments.text: Ledge grab again! Yeah, but watch the hitbox there—gotta be careful. Ah, there's the nair!
segments.original_text: もう崖つかまりいやーでもそうですね判定だしちょっと気をつけあーこれはネール

full_text: Ledge grab again! Yeah, but watch the hitbox there—gotta be careful. Ah, there's the nair!

corrections.rule: character move (Nayru's Love / ネールの愛)
